title: 3.27.0i Patch Notes
all_changes: This is the end of the Keepers League. Your characters and their progress will be migrated over the next few hours following the patch, or you can use the migration options in the character selection menu. Thanks for playing!

The following items have been removed, and existing items will be deleted upon logging in: Fleshgraft, Growing Wombgift, Augmentation Implant, Exalted Implant, Regal Implant, Unstable Implant, Draining Eshgraft, Jolting Eshgraft, Replicating Eshgraft, Storming Eshgraft, Aegis Tulgraft, Freezing Tulgraft, Squalling Tulgraft, Summoning Tulgraft, Battering Uulgraft, Hardening Uulgraft, Impaling Uulgraft, Spiking Uulgraft, Erupting Xophgraft, Flamecaller Xophgraft, Molten Xophgraft, and Stoking Xophgraft.
You can now create Private Leagues for the Mirage League, ahead of the league's launch on March 6. These leagues will not begin until the Mirage League launches.
After this patch, local cached assets will be cleaned up upon launching the client.
Last edited by Stacey_GGG#0000 on Mar 3, 2026, 1:19:28 AM

skill_buffs.raw: You can now create Private Leagues for the Mirage League, ahead of the league's launch on March 6. These leagues will not begin until the Mirage League launches.
